SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANDERSTEEN, WENDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FULFORD, LANCE MARSHALL, DAN $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, *PLAINTIFF DEMONSTRATED THE EXISTENCE OF THE CONTRACT, ADN THE ELIGIBILITY FOR COMPENSATION AND CALCULATED DAMAGES. DEFENDANTS FAILED TO SHOW ANY CIRCUMSTANCE TAHT ANY AMOUNTS WERE TO BE DEDUCTED FROM PLAINTIFF'S SHARE UNDER FIRM POLICIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
